title: Describe a person who has influenced you.
bullets: explain why they have influenced you
followUps: Do you think people are more influenced by family or by friends?
How has the way people influence each other changed with social media?

title: Describe a memorable trip you have taken.
followUps: Do you think travel changes the way people think?
What are the benefits of traveling with others versus traveling alone?

title: Describe a skill you would like to learn.
bullets: why you want to learn it
explain how it would benefit you
followUps: Why do you think some people continue learning new skills throughout their life while others don't?
Do you think it's more effective to learn skills through a class or by self-study?

title: Describe a time you helped someone.
bullets: explain how you felt about it
followUps: Do you think people today help strangers as much as in the past?
Why do you think some people are more willing to help others than others?

title: Describe a piece of technology you use often.
bullets: explain why it's useful to you
followUps: How do you think technology will change the way we communicate in the future?
Do you think people rely too much on technology nowadays?

title: Describe an important decision you made.
bullets: explain how it affected your life
followUps: Do you think it's better to make decisions quickly or take time to think them through?
How do you think culture influences the way people make decisions?

title: Describe a project you worked on at work or school.
bullets: explain what you learned from it
followUps: What do you think makes a project successful?
Do you think working in a team is more effective than working alone?

title: Describe a book or article that impressed you.
bullets: why you chose to read it
followUps: Do you think reading habits have changed because of the internet?
What kinds of books do you think will remain popular in the future?

title: Describe a goal you want to achieve in the next few years.
bullets: how you plan to achieve it
explain what challenges you might face
followUps: Do you think it's important for people to set long-term goals?
How do you think people's goals change as they get older?

title: Describe a time you had to solve a difficult problem.
followUps: Do you think people are better at solving problems alone or in groups?
What skills do you think are most important for solving difficult problems?

title: Describe a colleague or classmate you admire.
followUps: What qualities do you think make someone a good colleague?
Do you think it's important to have friends at work?

title: Describe a change you would like to make at your workplace.
bullets: explain what impact it would have
followUps: Do you think employees should have more say in workplace decisions?
How do you think workplaces will change in the next ten years?

title: Describe a time you had to work under pressure.
followUps: Do you think some people work better under pressure than others?
What can companies do to help employees manage stress?

title: Describe a city or place you would like to visit.
bullets: why you want to go there
followUps: Do you think tourism has more positive or negative effects on a place?
How has travel become easier or harder in recent years?

title: Describe an achievement you are proud of.
bullets: explain why you are proud of it
followUps: Do you think achievements are more meaningful when they're recognized by others?
How important is it for children to be praised for their achievements?

title: Describe a time you learned something new about technology.
bullets: why you decided to learn it
explain how it has helped you
followUps: Do you think older people find it harder to learn new technology?
How has access to online learning changed education?

title: Describe a mistake you learned from.
bullets: explain what you learned from it
followUps: Do you think schools should teach students that making mistakes is a normal part of learning?
Why do you think some people are afraid of admitting their mistakes?

title: Describe a rule you think is important.
bullets: explain why you think it's important
followUps: Do you think rules should be the same for everyone, or should there be exceptions?
How do rules in the workplace differ from rules at home?

title: Describe a time you gave someone advice.
followUps: Do you think people are more likely to take advice from friends or from experts?
Why do you think some people find it hard to accept advice?

title: Describe a website or app you find useful.
bullets: explain why you find it useful
followUps: Do you think apps have made daily life easier or more complicated?
How do you think people decide which apps or websites to trust?

title: Describe an event that made you proud of your community.
bullets: explain why it made you proud
followUps: Do you think community events are important for bringing people together?
How has the way communities celebrate changed over time?

title: Describe a time you disagreed with someone.
followUps: Do you think it's healthy for people to disagree openly?
What's the best way to resolve a disagreement at work?

title: Describe a leader you admire.
followUps: What qualities do you think make someone a good leader?
Do you think leadership qualities can be learned, or are people born with them?

title: Describe a habit you would like to change.
bullets: why you want to change it
explain how you plan to change it
followUps: Why do you think it's difficult for people to change their habits?
Do you think it's easier to change habits alone or with support from others?

title: Describe a time you worked in a team.
bullets: explain how the team worked together
followUps: What do you think makes a team work well together?
Do you think some people are better suited to teamwork than others?
